title: AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LALIG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO DOÃA CONCEPCION H. UMALI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

chunks.text:
H. No. 720 / 67 OG No. 9, 1543 (March 1, 1971)

[ REPUBLIC ACT NO. 6161, November 09, 1970 ]

AN ACT CHANGING THE NAME OF LALIG ELEMENTARY SCHOOL IN THE MUNICIPALITY OF TIAONG, PROVINCE OF QUEZON, TO DOÃA CONCEPCION H. UMALI ELEMENTARY SCHOOL.

Be it enacted by the Senate and House of Representatives of the Philippines in Congress assembled:

SECTION 1. The name of Lalig Elementary School in the Municipality of Tiaong, Province of Quezon, is hereby changed to Doña Concepcion H. Umali Elementary School.

SEC. 2. This Act shall take effect upon its approval.

Enacted without Executive approval, November 9, 1970.
